items.docs: Returns a list of all storage buckets in the project. Requires authenticated access with appropriate permissions.
Creates a new storage bucket with the specified configuration. Bucket names must be unique within a project and follow URL-safe naming conventions.

params.name: bucketId
params.description: Unique identifier or name of the storage bucket

items.docs: Retrieves details about a specific storage bucket including its configuration, visibility, and file size limits.

params.name: bucketId
params.description: Unique identifier or name of the storage bucket

items.docs: Updates the configuration of an existing storage bucket including its visibility, file size limits, and allowed MIME types.

params.name: bucketId
params.description: Unique identifier or name of the storage bucket

items.docs: Deletes an empty storage bucket. The bucket must be emptied of all objects before deletion.

params.name: bucketId
params.description: Unique identifier or name of the storage bucket

items.docs: Removes all objects from a storage bucket without deleting the bucket itself.

params.name: bucketName
params.description: Name of the storage bucket

params.name: objectPath
params.description: Path to the object within the bucket, including folder hierarchy and filename.

items.docs: Uploads a file to the specified path within a bucket. If a file already exists at the path, the upload will fail unless the upsert option is used. Supports standard uploads and multipart form data.

params.name: bucketName
params.description: Name of the storage bucket

params.name: objectPath
params.description: Path to the object within the bucket, including folder hierarchy and filename.

items.docs: Replaces an existing file at the specified path with new content. The file must already exist.

params.name: bucketName
params.description: Name of the storage bucket

params.name: objectPath
params.description: Path to the object within the bucket, including folder hierarchy and filename.

items.docs: Permanently deletes a file at the specified path within a bucket.

params.name: bucketName
params.description: Name of the storage bucket

params.name: objectPath
params.description: Path to the object within the bucket, including folder hierarchy and filename.

items.docs: Downloads a file from a private bucket. Requires authentication and appropriate Row Level Security permissions.

params.name: bucketName
params.description: Name of the storage bucket

params.name: objectPath
params.description: Path to the object within the bucket, including folder hierarchy and filename.

items.docs: Downloads a file from a public bucket. Does not require authentication.

params.name: bucketName
params.description: Name of the storage bucket

params.name: objectPath
params.description: Path to the object within the bucket, including folder hierarchy and filename.

items.docs: Generates a time-limited signed URL for accessing a private file without authentication. Useful for sharing temporary access to files.

params.name: bucketName
params.description: Name of the storage bucket

items.docs: Returns a list of objects within a bucket, optionally filtered by prefix (folder path). Supports pagination with limit and offset.
Moves a file from one location to another within the same bucket or across buckets. Can also be used to rename files.
Creates a copy of a file at a new location within the same bucket or across buckets.

params.name: bucketName
params.description: Name of the storage bucket

params.name: objectPath
params.description: Path to the object within the bucket, including folder hierarchy and filename.

params.name: width
params.description: Target width in pixels for image transformation

params.name: height
params.description: Target height in pixels for image transformation

params.name: resize
params.description: Resize mode for image transformation

params.name: format
params.description: Output format for image transformation

params.name: quality
params.description: Output quality for image transformation (1-100)

items.docs: Downloads and optionally transforms a private image with resizing, format conversion, and quality adjustments applied on the fly.

params.name: bucketName
params.description: Name of the storage bucket

params.name: objectPath
params.description: Path to the object within the bucket, including folder hierarchy and filename.

params.name: width
params.description: Target width in pixels for image transformation

params.name: height
params.description: Target height in pixels for image transformation

params.name: resize
params.description: Resize mode for image transformation

params.name: format

params.name: quality
params.description: Output quality for image transformation (1-100)

items.docs: Downloads and optionally transforms a public image with resizing, format conversion, and quality adjustments applied on the fly.
